zh.La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平
zh.La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Fran: 法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平
zh.Saint-Rambert-en-Bugey, Ain, Auvergne-Rh: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾沙吉拉波吉-布
zh.lifeSummary: 當Albert de La Tour Pin Ier於大約1126年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平時，他的父親Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur27歲，母親Marie de Saint-Rambert27歲。他於大約1150年與Alix de Savoye結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1218年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平享年94歲。

zh-hans.Saint-Rambert-en-Bugey, Ain, Auvergne-Rh: 法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾沙吉拉波吉-布
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albert de La Tour Pin Ier于大约1126年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平时，他的父亲Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur27岁，母亲Marie de Saint-Rambert27岁。他于大约1150年与Alix de Savoye结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1218年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Tour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Thür): habitational name from Thür near Koblenz, or from Thur in Brandenburg and Pomerania.
Swedish: variant of   Thor  .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Pin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Gisele, Jean Michel, Pierre.  Cambodian Sarin, Phorn, Saroeuth, Sophat, Chan, Pok, Soeun, Sou, Yoeum, Yong.
French: from Old French pin ‘pine’ (from Latin pinus), a topographic name for someone living by a prominent pine tree, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. Compare Dupin .
Dutch: from Middle Dutch pinne ‘(wooden or iron) pin, peg’, probably a metonymic occupational name for a craftsman using pins and pegs.

variants.name: Dupin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri, Laurent, Serge.
Altered form of French   Jupin  .

French: topographic name from Old French pin ‘pine’ (see Pin ), with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, or a habitational name for someone from any of the numerous minor places called Le Pin.

variants.name: Pineau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Alcide, Alphonse, Andree, Armand, Chantal, Laurent, Lucien, Marcel, Marthe, Raoul, Yves.

French: topographic name from a diminutive of pin ‘pine’ (see Pin ), or a habitational name from (Le) Pineau, the name of several places in the western part of France, of the same origin. Compare Pinault , Pineault , Pineo , and Pinneo .

History: Jean Pineau from France married Anne Chiasson in Acadia c. 1710. Pierre Pineau/Pinot dit Laperle from Le Mans in Sarthe, France, married Anne Boyer in QC in 1658. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Pineo ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pinet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Celine, Ghislain, Gillis, Herve, Martial, Sylvain.

French: topographic name from a diminutive of   Pin   ‘pine’, or a habitational name from (Le) Pinet, the name of several places in various parts of France, of the same origin. Compare   Pinel  ,   Pinell  ,   Pinette  , and   Spruce  .

History: Philippe Pinet, born either at Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) or in France, married Catherine Hébert, probably at Port-Royal, c. 1678. His descendants in LA also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Pinel and Pinell. Pierre Pinet from Chalandrey in Manche, France, married Marguerite Michaud in Kamouraska, QC, in 1765.

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Albert de La Tour Pin Ier was born about 1126, in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur, was 27 and his mother, Marie de Saint-Rambert, was 27. He married Alix de Savoye about 1150. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1218, in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albert de La Tour Pin Ier est né environ 1126, à La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marie de Saint-Rambert, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Savoye environ 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1218, à La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albert de La Tour Pin Ier um 1126 in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur 27 und seine Mutter Marie de Saint-Rambert 27. Er hat um 1150 Alix de Savoye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1218 im Alter von 94 Jahren in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albert de La Tour Pin Ier è nato il circa 1126 nel La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Saint-Rambert, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Savoye circa 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1218, nel La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albert de La Tour Pin Ierが約1126年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアラ トウル-ドウ-パンで生まれた時，父Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneurは27歳，母Marie de Saint-Rambertは27歳であった。約1150年にAlix de Savoyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1218年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアラ トウル-ドウ-パンで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albert de La Tour Pin Ier(이)가 대략 1126년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 라 토우-드-핀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Saint-Rambert(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 Alix de Savoye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1218년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 라 토우-드-핀에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albert de La Tour Pin Ier nasceu aproximadamente 1126, em La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Saint-Rambert, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Savoye aproximadamente 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1218, em La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albert de La Tour Pin Ier родился около 1126 г. в местности ла тоур-ду-пин, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Saint-Rambert, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Savoye около 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1218 г. в местности ла тоур-ду-пин, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albert de La Tour Pin Ier nació aproximadamente 1126, en La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Géraud de la Tour du Pin seigneur, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marie de Saint-Rambert, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alix de Savoye aproximadamente 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1218, en La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 94 años.
